chosen_live_plan_reason: Expected full-50 workload 350 logical calls for both methods exceeds decision threshold 250 (50*6 + 50*1 = 350). PAL path variability and SC6 decode diversity (temp=0) add risk; run 10-case calibration first with cap 80 (expected 70 calls).

known_risks.sc6_temperature_0: Independent samples at temperature 0 may collapse diversity vs paper-style sampling; caveated in manifests.
known_risks.pal_executor: Restricted Python execution may fail or return unparseable stdout; method_execution_error or parsing_failure.
known_risks.method_execution_error: Branch generator must expose PoT path; rare RuntimeError from API cap.
known_risks.parsing_failure: Empty normalized answer after self-consistency vote or missing PAL numeric extraction.
